name: litmdx-repo
description: Fast, modern documentation framework built on React + MDX
author: nol4ej

scripts.dev: concurrently -n core,cli,server -c blue,cyan,green --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm --filter @litmdx/core dev" "pnpm --filter litmdx dev" "node packages/cli/dist/bin/cli.js dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && node packages/cli/dist/bin/cli.js build
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @litmdx/core build && pnpm --filter litmdx build && pnpm --filter create-litmdx build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter "@litmdx/core" test && pnpm --filter "litmdx" test && pnpm --filter "create-litmdx" test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter "litmdx" typecheck && pnpm --filter "@litmdx/core" typecheck && pnpm --filter "create-litmdx" typecheck
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist .litmdx node_modules packages/core/dist packages/core/node_modules packages/cli/dist packages/cli/node_modules packages/create-litmdx/dist packages/create-litmdx/node_modules
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run publish:dry && pnpm run test
